question: What is the main point of the paper 'A Multimodal Discourse Analysis of Interpersonal Meaning in New-Type Farmers' Agricultural Promotion Short Videos on Douyin'?
answer: This study selects 15 short videos published over the past year by new-type farmers (xin nong ren) on Douyin as research corpus.
